Package minicp.examples

Class JobShop

java.lang.Object
minicp.examples.OptimizationProblem
minicp.examples.JobShop
public class JobShop extends OptimizationProblem
The JobShop Problem. Wikipedia.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    buildModel()
    Creates a model for the optimization A CP model is composed of the variables + a search procedure This method should set the values for OptimizationProblem.objective and OptimizationProblem.dfs such that OptimizationProblem.solve() can be called afterwards
    static IntVar[]
    flatten(IntVar[][] x)
     
    static void
    main(String[] args)

    • buildModel

      public void buildModel()
      Description copied from class: OptimizationProblem
      Creates a model for the optimization A CP model is composed of the variables + a search procedure This method should set the values for OptimizationProblem.objective and OptimizationProblem.dfs such that OptimizationProblem.solve() can be called afterwards
      Specified by:
      buildModel in class OptimizationProblem

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
